title: memecylon ceramense
intro: Memecylon ceramense is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to the island of Ceram in Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The leaves and bark of Memecylon ceramense are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, contributing to its health benefits. In herbal preparations, Memecylon ceramense is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
